category_sources: Official Prefixsuffix page describes a GUI application that renames batches of files by changing the beginning or end of their names.
source_facts.description says Prefixsuffix is a GUI batch renaming utility.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub Pages site title uses Prefixsuffix.
source_facts.name supplies the package name prefixsuffix.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages site is the project homepage and documentation surface.
Official GitHub repository README is an additional official documentation source.
repo_sources: Official Prefixsuffix GitHub Pages site identifies the project as maintained by murraycu.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official Prefixsuffix page describes renaming batches of files by prefix or suffix.
source_facts.description identifies a GUI batch renaming utility.
